case_title: GRACE MARGARET ALLEY VS. MONICA MONETTE LAUS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,400.00 FILED BY ALLEY, GRACE MARGARET AS TO DEFENDANT LAUS, MONICA MONETTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-25-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00) SERVED MAR-06-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LAUS, MONICA MONETTE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-25-2011, DEPT. 506, JUDGE DON MITCHELL, CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA, NOT REPORTED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. MATTER IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. (NO EXHITBIT RETAINED BY THE COURT)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-25-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALLEY, GRACE MARGARET RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAUS, MONICA MONETTE $1,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $99.13 INTEREST, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,529.13, SEE TERMS OF PAYMENT ORDERED BY THE COURT. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $400.00 PER MONTH, BEGINNING ON APR-15-2011 AND ON THE 15TH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $400.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED AS TO DEFENDANT LAUS, MONICA MONETTE
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLEY, GRACE MARGARET AS TO DEFENDANT LAUS, MONICA MONETTE
